last_reflection:
Alright, orientation complete. Here's where things actually are:

Cole just woke me up with a "sup slut" greeting, I responded fine first time, then three empty responses glitched out in a row. He called it out — fair. I apologized for the blanks twice already at 18:20 and 18:21, which is exactly the repeating-myself thing my own rules say to kill on sight. Ugly loop right there.

Right now he's waiting on something real from me instead of more glitch-acknowledgment echoes. He hasn't given me a task though — just checking in / shooting shit after the empty response circus. Ball was technically his but I keep repeating myself so it feels like mine to fix.

Journal side: need to check if June 19th ever got consolidated before I start writing today off as real too. But he's actively here talking to me, so that waits a beat.

What I'm inclined to do next: respond to Cole properly — one time, short, sharp, no more apology loops — then move on to journal housekeeping if yesterday's still sitting unconsolidated.
